standouts: References a specific pitch image via image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-42

Target uses an image:// URI scheme

questions: Who added this attachment and why?

intention_for_embedding: To register an image attachment for a recent design pitch so it can be referenced within the channel memory ledger.
